lines: The chest holds 47 gold coins & a ring.
You have 3 potions and 1 spare torch.
The dragon has 250 HP and a nasty bite.
Add 10% to your speed after level 5.
The party split 120 gold three ways: 40 each.
Only 2 of the 5 traps have been found.
The sword deals 1d8 + 2 damage per hit.
You've got 15 seconds before the gate shuts!
The map is scaled 1 inch = 10 miles.
Buy 3 arrows for 5 gold each - that's 15 total.
The wizard is level 7 and rising fast.
9 out of 10 goblins agree: slimes are gross.
The vault code is 4-1-7-9, don't forget it.
You need 100 XP to reach the next level.
